title.en: Ye Tian wore the Lost Gold Leaf and broke into ...

content.en:
After Ye Tian agreed to the Longyan Ancient Emperor's cooperation deal, the Longyan Ancient Emperor soon had a black-clothed guard deliver a piece of Lost Gold Leaf to him.

"The Lost Gold Leaf is in hand, you can go to the Lost Domain!"

Ye Tian had been looking forward to the Lost Domain for a long time, and he was eager to enter the Lost Domain and find more Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, so as to raise the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items to a tenth-percent consummation realm.

Wow!

Ye Tian kept shuttling, turning several fortresses from the Winter Night Fortress, and then directly escaped into the Void Domain, quickly heading to the Lost Domain.

After a period of hurrying, he came to an area shrouded in countless lights, through which he could enter the Lost Time and Space, and through the Lost Time and Space, he would be able to enter the Lost Domain.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian wore the Lost Gold Leaf and broke into the Lost Time and Space.

Upon entering, the Lost Gold Leaf released a golden light that melted into his will, causing him to ignore the effects of the Lost Space.

Subsequently.

He quickly traveled through the Lost Plane and entered the Lost Realm.

If you don't hurry in, the cost of Lost Gold Leaf will be too great.

In an instant, Ye Tian crossed the Lost Time and Space and broke into the Lost Domain.

......

The Lost Realm.

"Come in!"

Ye Tian immediately retracted his breath and became cautious.

Then, he found a slightly safer place and tried to condense his real body to replicate his body.

But when he successfully condensed his true body and copied his body, he was removed in an instant.

"Sure enough!"

Ye Tian was helpless.

Before, he had heard that the Lost Domain would move out of the Dao Realm, and he had to wear the Lost Gold Leaf to ensure that he would not be moved out of the Lost Domain.

And he only has a lost gold leaf.

"Why don't you go and get lost in time and space?"

Ye Tian decided.

It is said that without the cultivation of the legendary Dao realm, it will be very dangerous to enter the lost time and space, and it will be impossible to get out at all.

Anyway, no Nine Folds Dao Realm is willing to break into the Lost Time and Space, and he doesn't know the specific situation.

However, since this replica body has been removed, it is better to enter the lost time and space to take a look.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the Lost Time and Space without wearing the Lost Gold Leaf.

After entering, he finally knew why those Ninefold Knowing Realms didn't enter the Lost Time and Space.

It's not just about getting lost, it's about falling.

Streams of power poured into his body, even if he was as strong as him, he was a little unable to bear it, and he even wrapped himself in the fourth sequence of supreme dao rules to prevent this kind of power, but it was still useless.

He had lost his sense of bearing, he had lost his senses, and his consciousness was gradually lost.

Of course.

After all, he was extremely powerful, and he was naturally more able to resist than the ordinary Nine Folds Dao Realm.

"You have to find the Lost Gold Leaf to solve this problem!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But where to have the Lost Gold Leaf, he didn't know very well, and he was completely confused.

He wandered aimlessly, his body gradually becoming seriously damaged.

Suddenly.

A transparent creature, glowing with fluorescent colors, shuttled past him not far away.

This life seems to be composed of time, space, and a special force, but the strength is not strong.

For other Supreme Dao realms, such creatures have no value, and they don't pay attention to them at all.

But Ye Tian was extremely excited.

He can completely replicate the other person's body, so he can stay here forever.

"Copy now!"

Ye Tian stood here and didn't understand, and began to copy the other party's body.

Soon, the replication was successful.

【Temporal Glowfish】

This creature was copied by Ye Tian condensation.

He found that the Space-Time Glowfish copied its body and was not affected by the Lost Time and Space, and could roam freely here.

"Hahaha, with the space-time glow fish replicating the body, I should have hope of finding the Lost Golden Leaf!" Ye Tian thought secretly.

Thereupon.

He spent the rest of his life looking for the lost gold leaf here.

On the other side, Ye Tian's other replica body was searching for resources and the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items in the Lost Domain.

But the fourth sequence of supreme rules is not so easy to find, and the Lost Domain is also very dangerous, although there are not many powerful creatures in it, but there are also a lot, once encountered, it is a hard battle, any one is comparable to the top of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and many of them can be called the invincible existence of the Ninefold Dao Realm.

So.

There are still very few people who really dare to venture to the Lost Domain, and even if they are Immortal Emperors, they may not be invincible in the Lost Domain.

Otherwise, the Immortal Emperor would have swept away the Lost Realm a long time ago, and it would not have been the turn of the other Nine Realms to find opportunities.

But what is certain is that the Immortal Emperor must have obtained a large number of fourth-order supreme path rule items in the Lost Domain, otherwise he would not have comprehended the third-order supreme path rules in the ninefold supreme realm of the Dao realm.

......

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a terrifying black ape in the Lost Domain, and the other party's body was filled with the fourth sequence of supreme rules, and his body was extremely tenacious, and he could barely move.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian's Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Divine Power hit the opponent's body, but it only annihilated some hairs, and it couldn't penetrate the opponent's body at all.

"What kind of body is this?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

However, the other party couldn't help him.

After fighting for a long time, Ye Tian still left, and the black ape did not chase him.

If the Ancient Emperor of Longyan was here, he would know what kind of body this black ape was, this is the body of legends, and it is also the body of innate legends, of course, it is only a castrated version of the body of legends.

But even so, it is not something that the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm can break.

The legendary bodies of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance that are legendary to the Dao realm are the legendary bodies that imitate and borrow from some legendary creatures in the Void Domain, and they are perfected step by step, and finally surpass those legendary creatures.

And the black ape is not a legendary creature, but it has the blood of a legendary creature, which has a castrated version of the legendary body.

......

"The Lost Realm is really dangerous, the top Nine Realms are easy to fall!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It is also the kind of ninefold supreme realm that comprehends the rules of the fourth sequence of supreme paths, and walks the path second only to the strongest supreme path path, so that he has enough strength to survive here.

Otherwise, it is simply the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm that takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, and you can easily break through here.

Strictly speaking, Ye Tian's strength is a little insufficient.

"It's better to find some Lost Golden Leaf, otherwise this replica body will fall here, and there will be nothing!" Ye Tian muttered.

And this day.

Ye Tian really found the Lost Golden Leaf.
